title: The Adaptive Leader's Toolkit
subtitle: Practical Tools and Techniques from the Front Lines
summary: The Adaptive Leader's Toolkit is a practical guide for engineering leaders navigating today's fast-changing, complex world. Drawing on two decades of experience, Nikolay Angelov shares actionable tools, real-world stories, and proven techniques to help leaders and managers in tech adapt, grow, and succeed directly from the front lines of the industry. Whether you're a seasoned manager or a new technical lead, this book offers strategies for building self-awareness, fostering team trust, and turning adaptability into your most significant competitive advantage. Each chapter is designed to be a hands-on resource you can return to whenever you face new challenges or want to reflect on your leadership approach.
The book is available on Leanpub. You can get it from the links below.
